_publications._publicationTitle: Local low-dose lovastatin delivery improves the bone-healing defect caused by Nf1 loss of function in osteoblasts.

_contextSnippet: ...the callus from mice appeared larger (Figs. 1 and 2), as quantified by a 29% increase in calcified tissue volume by 3D µCT (A Fig. 2).
details: 29% increase in calcified tissue volume by 3D µCT at 21 days post-fracture compared to WT
